requirement_topic.en: El Salvador Grid Connection — 120/240 V, 60 Hz and SIGET / Distributor Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: 萨尔瓦多并网接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及SIGET / 配电公司协调
requirement_topic.zht: 薩爾瓦多併網接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及SIGET / 配電公司協調

summary.en: El Salvador is an Americas-style 60 Hz electricity market. EV charger projects should be designed for local 120/240 V single-phase service where applicable and the local three-phase service made available by the site utility. SIGET is the public authority for electricity and telecommunications, and grid-connected charger installations should be coordinated with the relevant distribution company such as CAESS, DELSUR, AES CLESA, EEO, or DEUSEM. Exporters should prepare site load calculations, protection settings, metering approach, grounding, harmonics information, and commissioning documents for local utility review.
summary.zh: 萨尔瓦多属于美洲式60 Hz电力市场。电动汽车充电项目应按当地适用的120/240 V单相供电以及场站配电公司可提供的三相供电进行设计。SIGET是电力和电信公共主管机关，并网充电桩安装应与相关配电公司协调，例如CAESS、DELSUR、AES CLESA、EEO或DEUSEM。出口商应准备场站负荷计算、保护设定、计量方案、接地、谐波资料和调试文件，供当地公用事业单位审查。
summary.zht: 薩爾瓦多屬於美洲式60 Hz電力市場。電動汽車充電項目應按當地適用的120/240 V單相供電以及場站配電公司可提供的三相供電進行設計。SIGET是電力和電信公共主管機關，併網充電樁安裝應與相關配電公司協調，例如CAESS、DELSUR、AES CLESA、EEO或DEUSEM。出口商應準備場站負荷計算、保護設定、計量方案、接地、諧波資料和調試文件，供當地公用事業單位審查。

standards_or_laws: SIGET electricity-sector authority and electricity legal framework
El Salvador distribution-company interconnection and service requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power-quality reference
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

summary.en: China domestic EVSE is normally designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, with GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence and China grid-operator project acceptance. That evidence does not prove readiness for El Salvador's 60 Hz service or local utility interconnection review.
summary.zh: 中国国内EVSE通常围绕220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz设计，并使用GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据及中国电网运营商项目验收。该等证据不能证明产品已适配萨尔瓦多60 Hz供电或当地公用事业接入审查。
summary.zht: 中國國內EVSE通常圍繞220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz設計，並使用GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據及中國電網運營商項目驗收。該等證據不能證明產品已適配薩爾瓦多60 Hz供電或當地公用事業接入審查。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: A China domestic 50 Hz charger package must be revalidated for 60 Hz operation, local voltage range, transformer or rectifier ratings, thermal derating, leakage-current protection, grounding, metering, and distributor commissioning. Do not ship on a 220/380 V 50 Hz nameplate assumption without confirming the Salvadoran site supply and utility acceptance route.
gap.zh: 中国国内50 Hz充电桩资料包必须重新验证60 Hz运行、当地电压范围、变压器或整流器额定值、热降额、漏电保护、接地、计量和配电公司调试要求。不得在仅假定铭牌为220/380 V 50 Hz的情况下出货，而应先确认萨尔瓦多场站供电和公用事业验收路径。
gap.zht: 中國國內50 Hz充電樁資料包必須重新驗證60 Hz運行、當地電壓範圍、變壓器或整流器額定值、熱降額、漏電保護、接地、計量和配電公司調試要求。不得在僅假定銘牌為220/380 V 50 Hz的情況下出貨，而應先確認薩爾瓦多場站供電和公用事業驗收路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations — confirm SIGET, distributor, and site-owner requirements for the specific location and service voltage
mandatory_status.cn: China grid acceptance applies domestically and is not a SIGET or Salvadoran distributor approval substitute

source.publisher: Superintendencia General de Electricidad y Telecomunicaciones (SIGET)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat 60 Hz / 120-240 V compatibility and distributor coordination as first-gate checks for El Salvador. A China 50 Hz project file is not grid-ready without voltage, frequency, protection, metering, and commissioning review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将60 Hz / 120-240 V兼容性及配电公司协调作为萨尔瓦多项目的第一道关口。中国50 Hz项目资料未经电压、频率、保护、计量和调试审查，不应视为已可并网。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將60 Hz / 120-240 V相容性及配電公司協調作為薩爾瓦多項目的第一道關口。中國50 Hz項目資料未經電壓、頻率、保護、計量和調試審查，不應視為已可併網。
